Location: Caba Island, Puerto Princesa, Palawan, MIMAROPA
Remarks: I recorded this owl on Caba Island with a local resident of Puerto Princesa who had permission for us to visit this privately-owned island.  There is some background noise, unfortunately, from the nearby Puerto Princesa airport and a workman constructing a shed.  The owl was in the mid-storey of a nearby tree about 20 meters away.  (Note that Google map calls this Salvacion Island, although our local boatman called it Caba Island.)

Remarks: This recording was made about 50 to 60 meters from a large tree that is an evening roosting site for a flock of Blue-naped Parrots.  There were about 10 parrots in the tree at the beginning of the recordings, and then loud greetings as smaller flocks of 5 to 6 parrots arrived at two times during the recording.  Clear skies, no rain, temperatures about 25 degrees.
